marca.descricao: Marca de produtos impressos em 3D (FDM PLA matte)

dark_moody_premium.luz_principal: warm amber 2700K cone vindo do canto superior-direito, falloff rápido pra shadows warm-brown profundas. Logo Mahou Prints em penumbra parcial. Mesa de madeira pega highlights warm onde luz cai.
dark_moody_premium.uso_critico: Produto ACESO deve emitir luz própria warm que se mistura com ambient. Layer lines suavizam quando produto translúcido está iluminado por dentro (regra feedback_mahou_layers_luz_acesa).

como_selecionar_cena.regra_1: Verifique se nome/refs do produto se encaixam em alguma das categorias listadas em cenas[X].categorias_produto
como_selecionar_cena.regra_2: Se o produto for de banheiro (porta-escova, suporte de papel, gancho de toalha, dispenser, etc) → use bathroom_modern_black_marble
como_selecionar_cena.regra_3: Se o produto ACENDE (abajur, luminária, mobile com luz, LED) → use dark_moody_premium para ter contraste correto
como_selecionar_cena.regra_4: Se o produto for de berço/quarto de bebê → nursery_soft_pastel
como_selecionar_cena.regra_5: Default (genérico, decorativo, organizador de mesa, etc) → wooden_warm_cozy
como_selecionar_cena.regra_6: Se ambíguo, perguntar ao usuário antes de gerar

tecnico_fdm.layers_descricao: Horizontal STRAIGHT layer lines (0.2mm thick) parallel to the print bed/table surface, wrapping around the form like stacked rings/horizontal stripes at constant Z-height. Each line is one full revolution at the same height — NEVER spiral, NEVER concentric circles on side walls or curved surfaces. Tight, uniform, parallel — like contour lines on a topographic map but all horizontal.
tecnico_fdm.top_surface: Concentric circular tool-path rings ONLY on flat horizontal top/bottom surfaces (e.g., the top of the base plate seen from above, or any flat horizontal facet pointing up). NEVER on curved walls or vertical surfaces. Subtle, not exaggerated.
tecnico_fdm.side_profile: Visible thin vertical z-seam stripe where each horizontal layer starts/ends (one vertical line down the side). Subtle stepping on steeply sloped curves where layers transition.
tecnico_fdm.finish: Matte PLA with silky satin layer reflection. NOT glossy, NOT plastic-shiny.
tecnico_fdm.realism_note: Layer lines should look NATURAL — more prominent in close-up views and on highly curved areas (where the eye catches the stepping), subtle and almost invisible on flatter or distant regions. Density ~5 lines per centimeter of height (0.2mm layers). Always parallel to print bed (horizontal), never wrapping the surface like vinyl grooves.
tecnico_fdm.negative_critical: NO concentric circles on side walls. NO spiral patterns. NO vinyl-grooves look on curved surfaces. NO uniform circular texture wrapping the form. Layer lines are STRAIGHT and HORIZONTAL — like stacked rings at fixed heights, not flowing with the curve.

pla_cherry_red.descricao: Vibrant cherry red / strawberry red (#DC143C to #E63946), Masterprint Red PLA - bright, saturated, NOT burgundy/brown

pla_black_matte.descricao: Deep matte black, soft non-reflective with subtle layer texture

pla_white_pure.descricao: Clean pure white PLA, slight cream warmth, matte finish

composicao_padrao.qualidade: photorealistic, ultra-high resolution, e-commerce hero shot quality
composicao_padrao.dof: Shallow DOF - product tack-sharp, background elements gently blurred but recognizable
composicao_padrao.angulo: slight 3/4 angle (mas TOP-DOWN para cortadores planos e produtos baixos)
composicao_padrao.framing: Close-up product photography style — product fills 60-70% of the frame, camera positioned close (~30-40cm equivalent). Background and props (logo, plant, books) visible but secondary. The product is the protagonist, not the environment.
composicao_padrao.lighting_para_layers: Slight raking side light from low angle reveals the FDM layer texture (highlight on top edge of each ring, subtle shadow in the recess between) without overpowering the scene

negative_prompt_padrao: NO glossy/wet/injection-molded plastic look. NO smooth seamless surface - FDM layer lines MUST be visible. NO resin/SLA smoothness
